category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to Côte d'Ivoire (CODINORM / VoC conformity).

title.en: China-to-Côte d'Ivoire LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入科特迪瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入科特迪瓦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Côte d'Ivoire requirements — CODINORM national standards (NI, adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme administered under the Ministry of Trade, energy labelling, ARTCI radio approval for smart luminaires, French-language documentation, and an in-country importer — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与科特迪瓦要求差距对照——CODINORM 国家标准（NI，采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、贸易部主管的进口符合性验证（VoC）计划、能效标签、智能灯具的 ARTCI 无线电批准、法语文件及在地进口商——与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與科特迪瓦要求差距對照——CODINORM 國家標準（NI，採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、貿易部主管的進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃、能效標籤、智能燈具的 ARTCI 無線電批准、法語文件及在地進口商——與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Côte d'Ivoire law, CODINORM national standards (NI), the applicable Verification of Conformity (VoC) import programme scope, energy labelling rules, and ARTCI radio requirements with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM 国家标准（NI）、适用的进口符合性验证（VoC）计划范围、能效标签规则及 ARTCI 无线电要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM 國家標準（NI）、適用的進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃範圍、能效標籤規則及 ARTCI 無線電要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Côte d'Ivoire should expect to meet CODINORM national standards (NI), which adopt the IEC base (IEC 60598 for luminaires, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 62471 for photobiological safety) — the same IEC family that underlies China's GB standards, so the technical content is largely shared. The key differences are procedural and documentary: regulated electrical products typically pass through a pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme administered under the Ministry of Trade with CODINORM involvement, requiring a Certificate of Conformity per shipment or product registration; an energy-efficiency label may apply; smart/wireless luminaires require ARTCI radio approval; all documentation should be available in French; and an in-country importer is needed for clearance at Abidjan or San-Pedro. Côte d'Ivoire does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS hazardous-substance regime, so there is no standalone RoHS substance-restriction obligation equivalent to the EU directive — verify current product scope before each shipment. None of these steps are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向科特迪瓦出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期满足 CODINORM 国家标准（NI），该等标准采用 IEC 基础（灯具 IEC 60598、自镇流灯 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471）——与中国 GB 标准同属 IEC 体系，技术内容大体一致。主要差异在于程序和文件：受管制电气产品通常须通过贸易部主管、CODINORM 参与的装运前符合性验证（VoC）计划，要求每批装运出具符合性证书或进行产品注册；可能适用能效标签；智能/无线灯具须取得 ARTCI 无线电批准；所有文件应备有法语版本；并需在地进口商在阿比让或圣佩德罗港清关。科特迪瓦不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 有害物质制度，因此不存在相当于欧盟指令的独立 RoHS 物质限制义务——请在每次装运前核查现行产品范围。上述步骤均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向科特迪瓦出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期滿足 CODINORM 國家標準（NI），該等標準採用 IEC 基礎（燈具 IEC 60598、自鎮流燈 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471）——與中國 GB 標準同屬 IEC 體系，技術內容大體一致。主要差異在於程序和文件：受管制電氣產品通常須通過貿易部主管、CODINORM 參與的裝運前符合性驗證（VoC）計劃，要求每批裝運出具符合性證書或進行產品注冊；可能適用能效標籤；智能/無線燈具須取得 ARTCI 無線電批准；所有文件應備有法語版本；並需在地進口商在阿比讓或聖佩德羅港清關。科特迪瓦不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 有害物質制度，因此不存在相當於歐盟指令的獨立 RoHS 物質限制義務——請在每次裝運前核查現行產品範圍。上述步驟均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Côte d'Ivoire regulator (CODINORM, Ministry of Trade / Commerce, ARTCI), IEC standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. The VoC import programme scope, CODINORM national standard (NI) references, and any energy-labelling thresholds must be re-verified against current official Côte d'Ivoire guidance and the appointed conformity-assessment body on each review cycle.

q.en: Does Côte d'Ivoire require a Verification of Conformity (VoC) for imported LED luminaires?
q.zh: 科特迪瓦是否要求进口 LED 灯具进行符合性验证（VoC）？
q.zht: 科特迪瓦是否要求進口 LED 燈具進行符合性驗證（VoC）？

a.en: Regulated electrical and electronic products imported into Côte d'Ivoire typically pass through a pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme administered under the Ministry of Trade with CODINORM involvement, against CODINORM national standards (NI) that adopt the IEC base. A Certificate of Conformity is generally required for customs clearance at Abidjan or San-Pedro. Exact product scope and the appointed conformity-assessment body can change — confirm the current programme with CODINORM and your in-country importer before shipment.
a.zh: 进口至科特迪瓦的受管制电气电子产品通常须通过贸易部主管、CODINORM 参与的装运前符合性验证（VoC）计划，依据采用 IEC 基础的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）进行评定。清关（阿比让或圣佩德罗港）通常须出具符合性证书。具体产品范围及指定的合格评定机构可能变更——请在装运前与 CODINORM 及在地进口商确认现行计划。
a.zht: 進口至科特迪瓦的受管制電氣電子產品通常須通過貿易部主管、CODINORM 參與的裝運前符合性驗證（VoC）計劃，依據採用 IEC 基礎的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）進行評定。清關（阿比讓或聖佩德羅港）通常須出具符合性證書。具體產品範圍及指定的合格評定機構可能變更——請在裝運前與 CODINORM 及在地進口商確認現行計劃。

q.en: Does Côte d'Ivoire have a RoHS-style hazardous-substance restriction for LED luminaires?
q.zh: 科特迪瓦对 LED 灯具是否有 RoHS 式有害物质限制？
q.zht: 科特迪瓦對 LED 燈具是否有 RoHS 式有害物質限制？

a.en: No. Côte d'Ivoire does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS hazardous-substance regime for electrical and electronic equipment, so there is no standalone RoHS substance-restriction obligation equivalent to the EU directive for LED luminaires. General product safety, the CODINORM NI standards (IEC-based), and the VoC import programme still apply. Verify current requirements before each shipment, as regulations evolve.
a.zh: 没有。科特迪瓦不对电气电子设备实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 有害物质制度，因此 LED 灯具不存在相当于欧盟指令的独立 RoHS 物质限制义务。一般产品安全、CODINORM NI 标准（基于 IEC）及 VoC 进口计划仍然适用。法规会变化，请在每次装运前核查现行要求。
a.zht: 沒有。科特迪瓦不對電氣電子設備實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 有害物質制度，因此 LED 燈具不存在相當於歐盟指令的獨立 RoHS 物質限制義務。一般產品安全、CODINORM NI 標準（基於 IEC）及 VoC 進口計劃仍然適用。法規會變化，請在每次裝運前核查現行要求。
